steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize the aesthetic qualities of the work. Knight's key phrase is 'charm and a warmth and a beauty' — any correct answer must bring that language in.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'charm and a warmth and a beauty,' 'imperfect,' 'undeniably human': uses Knight's exact aesthetic descriptors. ✓
  • Choice B: focuses on technical difficulty of the craft, not aesthetic qualities. ✗
  • Choice C: focuses on historical origin of the tradition, not aesthetics. ✗
  • Choice D: focuses on the production process, not aesthetic qualities. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
